title: Aspidogyne sagrana
taxonomy: Aspidogyne sagrana is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 32,000 species of orchids. It is a genus of orchids endemic to Mexico. The Aspidogyne genus is part of the subtribe Cranichidinae, which also includes other orchid species. Aspidogyne sagrana is a terrestrial orchid that grows in the wild, typically in shaded environments. Further classification of Aspidogyne sagrana may involve more specific taxonomic details.
